# steel-analyzer-automation

Automated steel structure analysis pipeline. Accepts raw project files from Google Drive, runs Gemini-based extraction, generates Excel workbooks, performs Claude QA review, and uploads verified artifacts back to Drive.

## Stack

- Runtime: Node.js (ESM, `"type": "module"`)
- Key libraries: `exceljs ^4.4.0`, `googleapis ^171.4.0`, `grammy` (Telegram)
- No n8n in this pipeline

## Architecture

```
telegram-bot.mjs (/run command, TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID gate)
  â†’ pipeline-runner.mjs (runPipeline)
      â†’ steel-drive.mjs download (User OAuth, MD5-verified)
      â†’ llm-dispatcher.mjs (dispatchGeminiAnalysis via spawnSync gemini)
          â†’ steel-analysis-prompt.mjs (buildAnalysisPrompt)
          â†’ workbook-generator.mjs (JSON â†’ 3 xlsx)
          â†’ artifact-verifier.mjs (output check)
      â†’ dispatchClaudeQA (stub in Sprint 11, auto-ACCEPTED)
      â†’ Telegram inline buttons: approve_upload / reject_upload
      â†’ publish-run.mjs (publishes run state to dashboard/runs/index.json)
  â†’ steel-drive.mjs upload (owner-approval token required)

dashboard/ (Vercel-hosted static dashboard)
  â†’ runs/index.json (run history generated by publish-run.mjs)

steel-orchestrator.mjs (file-bus watcher, PM2) â€” parallel long-running process
ecosystem.config.cjs â€” PM2 config: steel-bot + steel-orchestrator
```

## Key Commands

```bash
# Run tests
cd agent-core && npm test

# Drive operations
node agent-core/scripts/steel-drive.mjs list --run <id> --folder <folder_id>
node agent-core/scripts/steel-drive.mjs download --run <id> --folder <folder_id>
node agent-core/scripts/steel-drive.mjs upload --run <id> --folder <folder_id> \
  --file <path> --owner-approval "I_APPROVE_STEEL_UPLOAD:<run_id>:<folder_id>"

# Orchestrator
node agent-core/scripts/steel-orchestrator.mjs
node agent-core/scripts/steel-orchestrator.mjs status
node agent-core/scripts/steel-orchestrator.mjs init <run_id> <project_name> <delivery_mode>

# PM2 (Sprint 10)
pm2 start ecosystem.config.cjs          # starts steel-bot + steel-orchestrator
pm2 logs steel-bot
pm2 restart steel-bot
## File Map

```
ecosystem.config.cjs                  PM2 config: steel-bot + steel-orchestrator
dashboard/
  index.html                          Vercel dashboard landing
  runs/
    index.json                        Run history (JSON array)
agent-core/
  package.json                        npm root (steel-agent-core)
  scripts/
    steel-drive.mjs                   Drive wrapper (799 lines)
    steel-orchestrator.mjs            File-bus watcher (843 lines)
  src/
    telegram-bot.mjs                  grammy bot, /run /status /cancel + approve/reject (178 lines)
    pipeline-runner.mjs               runPipeline(): downloadâ†’analysisâ†’QAâ†’approval (90 lines)
    publish-run.mjs                   Dashboard publisher (54 lines)
    llm-dispatcher.mjs                dispatchGeminiAnalysis() via spawnSync gemini (81 lines)
...
<!-- updated-by-superflow:2026-05-24 -->
<!-- sprint:11 -->
      steel-analysis-prompt.mjs       buildAnalysisPrompt() for Gemini (33 lines)
    workbook-generator.mjs            JSON â†’ xlsx via ExcelJS (341 lines)
    artifact-verifier.mjs             Output directory checker (60 lines)
  steel-bus/
    lib/state-machine.mjs             Pure state machine, 17 states
    lib/gepa-register.mjs             GEPA proposal tracking
    inbox/                            Signal drop zone (runtime)
    runs/                             Per-run state dirs (runtime, not committed)
    dead-letter/                      Failed signal archive (runtime)
  schemas/                            JSON schemas for all bus signals
  test/                               *.test.mjs â€” includes telegram-bot, llm-dispatcher, pipeline-runner tests (Sprint 10)
docs/
  superflow/specs/                    Feature specs
  superflow/plans/                    Sprint plans
  handoffs/                           Cross-runtime handoff notes
  operations/                         Runbooks
```

## State Machine States

`requested` â†’ `sources_manifested` â†’ `sources_downloaded` â†’ `extraction_done` â†’ `workbooks_generated` â†’ `workbooks_validated` â†’ `producer_handoff_done` â†’ `claude_review_requested` â†’ `claude_review_passed` | `claude_review_blocked` â†’ `codex_integration_requested` â†’ `codex_integration_done` â†’ `gepa_proposed` â†’ `gepa_reviewed` â†’ `upload_ready` â†’ `uploaded_verified` â†’ `closed` | `dead_letter`

<!-- updated-by-superflow:2026-05-24 -->
<!-- sprint:10 -->
